creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks, but I deliberately chose the .zip distribution so that both 
dist files are .zip.  The original patch did use the .tar.bz2 version 
but I didn't like the additional complications that added.  Your patch 
would seem to rely on unzip being able to unpack a .tar.bz2 archive, 
so I'm not even sure it would work.
